001/**
002 * Game class - the main engine of the text adventure "Henriette's Feast".
003 * It sets up the snowy village, creates all the rooms and their exits,
004 * then runs the game loop where Grandma Henriette moves around the village
005 * to gather everything she needs for the Christmas dinner.
006 *
007 * @author Raphaël Quillaud
008 * @version 2026.05.09
009 */
010
011public class Game {
012    private UserInterface aGui;
013    private GameEngine aEngine;
014
015    /**
016     * Creates the game, initializes the rooms and the parser,
017     * then starts the game loop.
018     */
019    public Game() {
020        this.aEngine = new GameEngine();
021        this.aGui = new UserInterface(this.aEngine);
022        this.aEngine.setGUI(this.aGui);
023    }
024
025    /**
026     * Main method to start the game.
027     *
028     * @param args command line arguments (not used)
029     */
030    public static void main(String[] args) {
031        new Game();
032    }
033} // Game
